title: Home Assistant node returns time in UTC
symptom: The time output from the Home Assistant node in n8n is different from the expected local time, appearing in UTC instead.
not_this_if: Time output matches expected local time
root_cause: The Home Assistant node returns timestamps in UTC format, which may not align with the local timezone settings configured in n8n or the Home Assistant instance.
fix_steps: Add a Set node after the Home Assistant node
Use the expression '{{ $json.last_changed.toDateTime().setZone('Asia/Manila') }}' to convert the time to your preferred timezone
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Add a Set node to convert the timestamp to your local timezone using the provided expression.
